inputs.label: Raw Cortisol Level
inputs.businessContext: The measured cortisol level from a laboratory test in micrograms per deciliter.

businessContext_i18n.en: The measured cortisol level from a laboratory test in micrograms per deciliter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Laboratuvar testinden desilitre başına mikrogram cinsinden ölçülen kortizol seviyesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der gemessene Cortisolspiegel aus einem Labortest in Mikrogramm pro Deziliter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le niveau de cortisol mesuré lors d'un test de laboratoire en microgrammes par décilitre.
businessContext_i18n.es: El nivel de cortisol medido en una prueba de laboratorio en microgramos por decilitro.

inputs.label: Unit Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from mcg/dL to nmol/L (1 mcg/dL = 27.59 nmol/L). Set to 1 if no conversion needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor from mcg/dL to nmol/L (1 mcg/dL = 27.59 nmol/L). Set to 1 if no conversion needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: mcg/dL'den nmol/L'ye dönüşüm faktörü (1 mcg/dL = 27.59 nmol/L). Dönüşüm gerekmiyorsa 1 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umrechnungsfaktor von mcg/dL in nmol/L (1 mcg/dL = 27,59 nmol/L). Auf 1 setzen, wenn keine Umrechnung erforderlich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion de mcg/dL en nmol/L (1 mcg/dL = 27,59 nmol/L). Mettre à 1 si aucune conversion n'est nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión de mcg/dL a nmol/L (1 mcg/dL = 27.59 nmol/L). Establecer en 1 si no se necesita conversión.

inputs.label: Time-of-Day Factor
inputs.businessContext: Diurnal variation multiplier (e.g., morning peak ≈ 1.0, evening trough ≈ 0.4). Default 1 for standard morning measurement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diurnal variation multiplier (e.g., morning peak ≈ 1.0, evening trough ≈ 0.4). Default 1 for standard morning measurement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük değişim çarpanı (örneğin, sabah zirvesi ≈ 1.0, akşam düşüşü ≈ 0.4). Standart sabah ölçümü için varsayılan 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für tageszeitliche Schwankungen (z. B. morgendlicher Spitzenwert ≈ 1,0, abendlicher Tiefpunkt ≈ 0,4). Standard 1 für morgendliche Standardmessung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de variation diurne (ex. pic matinal ≈ 1,0, crepuscule vespéral ≈ 0,4). Par défaut 1 pour une mesure matinale standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de variación diurna (p. ej., pico matutino ≈ 1.0, valle vespertino ≈ 0.4). Valor predeterminado 1 para medición estándar matutina.

inputs.label: Acute Stress Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for acute physiological or psychological stress (normal = 1, elevated stress > 1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for acute physiological or psychological stress (normal = 1, elevated stress > 1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akut fizyolojik veya psikolojik stres için ayarlama (normal = 1, yüksek stres > 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für akute physiologische oder psychologische Belastung (normal = 1, erhöhte Belastung > 1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour le stress physiologique ou psychologique aigu (normal = 1, stress élevé > 1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por estrés fisiológico o psicológico agudo (normal = 1, estrés elevado > 1).

inputs.label: Age Correction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for age-related cortisol changes (e.g., elderly may have lower baseline). Default 1 for standard adult.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for age-related cortisol changes (e.g., elderly may have lower baseline). Default 1 for standard adult.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaşa bağlı kortizol değişiklikleri için çarpan (örneğin, yaşlılarda düşük bazal seviye olabilir). Standart yetişkin için varsayılan 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für altersbedingte Cortisol-Veränderungen (z. B. ältere Menschen haben möglicherweise niedrigere Basiswerte). Standard 1 für normale Erwachsene.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour les changements de cortisol liés à l'âge (ex. les personnes âgées peuvent avoir une valeur de base plus basse). Par défaut 1 pour un adulte standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador por cambios de cortisol relacionados con la edad (p. ej., personas mayores pueden tener un nivel basal más bajo). Valor predeterminado 1 para adulto estándar.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
